title: docs: clarify app submission quality guidelines
author: Satya-0023

gist.headline: Tending the garden
gist.blurb: We've updated the playbook for submitting apps to the showcase. Better guidelines mean better blooms for everyone.
gist.summary: Added a comprehensive checklist and quality guidelines to the app submission documentation to help contributors build better tools.
gist.impact: Contributors now have clearer expectations for getting their apps approved and featured in the showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener/inspector. She is holding a clipboard (the guidelines) and checking on 'app plants'. Some plants are glowing and healthy (approved), others need work. The metaphor is quality control in a garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot holding a tiny pixelated clipboard, inspecting a row of glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. A small robot companion is watering the healthiest plant. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'QUALITY'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
